per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you notice any other symptoms when it happens?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: The pain is really bad when I have to go to the bathroom, and after I finish going, I still feel uncomfortable that makes me want to push again.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I don't smoke. As for drinking, I do have a few beers most weeknights to unwind after work.
